backend_engineer.bullet_style: action verb + technical context + quantifiable impact
backend_engineer.experience_selection_criteria: Select the 2 experiences with the most relevant backend/API/database work, prioritizing recent roles

data_engineer.bullet_style: action verb + data volume/scale context + business impact
data_engineer.experience_selection_criteria: Select experiences that involve data processing, pipelines, or analytics infrastructure

fullstack_engineer.bullet_style: action verb + feature/product context + user or business metric
fullstack_engineer.experience_selection_criteria: Select experiences showing both frontend and backend contributions; prioritize product impact

data_analyst.bullet_style: action verb + analysis scope or dataset size + business insight or decision enabled
data_analyst.experience_selection_criteria: Select experiences involving data analysis, reporting, BI dashboards, or deriving insights from data; prioritize roles with direct business impact

software_engineer.bullet_style: action verb + technical approach + quality, efficiency, or reliability outcome
software_engineer.experience_selection_criteria: Select the 2 most representative experiences of solid software engineering practice across any domain; value breadth, design decisions, and measurable outcomes

ia_developer.bullet_style: action verb + AI/ML technique or model type + performance metric or business impact
ia_developer.experience_selection_criteria: Select experiences involving ML models, AI applications, LLM integrations, or data science workflows; prioritize roles with measurable model or product outcomes

automatization_developer.bullet_style: action verb + automation scope + time saved, error reduction, or reliability gained
automatization_developer.experience_selection_criteria: Select experiences focused on automating manual processes, orchestrating workflows, or building integrations; prioritize roles with clear efficiency or reliability improvements
